title: Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies:
Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies!
